pi_items.verified_value: Technical Assessment (custom stage, not in Odoo demo data)
pi_items.source: Task definition and Odoo documentation - verified that default stages do not include 'Technical Assessment'

pi_items.verified_value: technical evaluation (custom description keyword, not in Odoo demo data)
pi_items.source: Task verifier checks for this phrase; no evidence of this phrase in Odoo default recruitment stages
Official Odoo 18.0 documentation (https://www.odoo.com/documentation/18.0/applications/hr/recruitment.html) and Odoo 19.0 documentation confirm 'First Interview' as a default recruitment stage
Official Odoo 18.0 documentation and Odoo 19.0 documentation confirm 'Second Interview' as a default recruitment stage

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real Odoo recruitment stages 'First Interview' and 'Second Interview' from the default demo data as reference points. The target stage 'Technical Assessment' with description keyword 'technical evaluation' is a custom/synthetic stage created for this task scenario. These are not part of Odoo's default recruitment pipeline, which by default includes: New, Initial Qualification, First Interview, Second Interview, Contract Proposal, Contract Signed, and Refuse applicant.
